title: CLI Invocation Flow

decision_tree.action: Rewrite process.argv (strip 'detect') → import detectCli from src/detect-antipatterns.mjs → await detectCli()
Rewrite process.argv (strip 'live') → import liveCli from src/detect-antipatterns.mjs → await liveCli()
import { run } from bin/commands/skills.mjs → await run(args.slice(1))
Treat all args as detect arguments → import detectCli → await detectCli()

sub_decision.action: showHelp() — fetch /api/commands from impeccable.style API, print table, exit
install(flags) — check isAlreadyInstalled → if !installed: execSync(npx skills add) → optionally ask for prefix → renameSkillsWithPrefix → cleanup deprecated → print done
update(flags) — cleanup deprecated → findInstalledProviders → downloadAndExtractBundle → isUpToDate check → confirm → copyDirSync each skill → re-apply prefix → post-cleanup
check() — findProjectRoot → isAlreadyInstalled → findInstalledProviders → downloadAndExtractBundle → isUpToDate → report status or suggest update

key_helpers: findProjectRoot() — walks up from cwd until .git found
isAlreadyInstalled(root) — scans PROVIDER_DIRS for 'impeccable'/'teach-impeccable' skill entry
findInstalledProviders(root) — returns array of provider dirs that have skill dirs
downloadAndExtractBundle() — GET /api/download/bundle/universal → unzip to tmpDir → return path
isUpToDate(root, providers, bundleDir) — deduplicateProviders → compare SKILL.md hashes (normalized)
renameSkillsWithPrefix(root, prefix) — rename real skill dirs and fix symlinks + update SKILL.md cross-refs
detectPrefix(root) — infer current prefix by scanning for 'impeccable' skill folder name
external_dependencies: npx skills add pbakaus/impeccable — install via external tool
activity_flow_summary: command? → [--version/-v] → read package.json → print version → EXIT 0
skills:install → isAlreadyInstalled? → [yes+!force] EXIT 0 | [no/force] → execSync npx skills → prefix? → rename skills → cleanup
skills:update → cleanup deprecated → find providers → download bundle → up-to-date? → [yes] EXIT 0 | [no] → confirm → copyDirSync → re-prefix → post-cleanup
skills:check → isInstalled? → download bundle → compare hashes → report
important_notes: Dynamic ESM imports (await import()) used for all sub-commands, enabling lazy loading. process.argv is mutated before sub-command dispatch to hide the top-level command word. The 'skills' path is the most complex branch with install/update/check sub-flows.
